productDisplayName: French Connection Men Navy Blue Trousers
description: Style NoteTypically associated with British country wear and quirky, bookish men, corduroys have taken on a new avatar. Giving this vintage look a modern makeover, french connection has upped the style stakes with these well-fitted skinny corduroys to create a must-have inclusion for the new season. Match this pair with a long coat and shirt for a semi formal look or with casual top wear for a relaxed one. The velvety feel and the soft fabric will take care of your comfort. Product DetailsNavy blue corduroy trousers, has belt loops around the waist, one loop under the waistband for a low slung belt, button and zipped closure, two insert pockets in front with a coin pocket inside the right insert pocket and two patch pockets at the back with a small patch pocket on the right patch pocketMaterial and care100% cottonMachine wash warmDo not bleach or tumble dryUse cool ironSize and FitSkinny fitThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
